'''Clak'dor IV''' was a [[Bith/Legends|Bith]] colony [[Planet/Legends|world]]. Most of the [[Y'bith/Legends|Y'bith]] left [[Clak'dor VII/Legends|Clak'dor VII]] and resettled here, in the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[New Nozho]].

==Appearances==
*[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 17|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 17]] {{1stm}} {{ID|Clak'dor 4}}
